title: Tristate does not work with multiple assignments

features.name: default z assignment at top of always_comb with conditional override
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block that assigns 1'bz as a default at the top of the block, followed by a conditional override to a non-z value, relying on the default to propagate the tristate when the condition is false

features.name: explicit if-else tristate in always_comb
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block that uses an explicit if/else construct to drive a signal to either a logic value or 1'bz, with the tristate value placed in the else branch rather than as a default

features.name: multiple always_comb drivers on a single tristate net
features.description: Code should include two or more always_comb blocks each independently driving the same signal, where each driver uses a condition to either output a logic value or yield 1'bz, modeling a wired-OR tristate bus with multiple concurrent drivers

features.name: ternary operator with z arm as always_comb driver
features.description: Code should include an always_comb continuous assignment using a ternary expression where one arm is 1'bz, used to implement a conditional tristate driver on a shared net
